creator: nwhitehorn@FreeBSD.org
text:
Class Changed
From-To: sw-bug->change-request

sysinstall isn't supported for installation in 9.0 due to changes in the 
distribution format, system tools, and release process. It's provided on the 
media only for package installation and post-install configuration. It could 
possibly be updated to work again from the same media as bsdinstall, so I'm 
changing this from a bug report to a feature request.
